objective: Remove temporary artifact PR issue coupling, make skipped intelligence paths actionable, and add regression coverage for generated artifact PR evidence.
scope_boundary: Update Overlord Sweep generated artifact PR branch and scope generation to use permanent issue #503.
Add deterministic tests for generated artifact PR branch names and scope payloads.
Document PentAGI and Codex skipped-state requirements so missing credentials are actionable rather than silent failures.
out_of_scope: Changing generated graph/wiki/metric content outside a sweep run.
research_summary: The prior issue #487 workflow fix proved artifact PR persistence but reused an incident issue. The latest sweep also showed PentAGI and Codex second-opinion paths can be skipped because credentials are unavailable. This sprint makes the artifact PR path permanent and documented, and protects it with unit tests.

sprints.name: Artifact PR and skipped-state hardening
sprints.goal: Make generated artifact PR governance durable and skipped intelligence paths explicit.
tasks: Extract artifact branch/scope generation into a tested helper.
Update the workflow to call the helper and reference issue #503.
Add runbook guidance for PentAGI and Codex second-opinion skipped states.
Validate structured plans, execution scope, and targeted unit tests.
acceptance_criteria: No new Overlord Sweep artifact PR branch references issue #487.
Generated artifact PR scope payload references issue #503.
Unit tests assert branch naming and scope write paths.
Runbook documents required PentAGI and Codex auth configuration and expected skip behavior.

specialist_reviews.focus: Confirm the workflow no longer depends on the closed issue #487 and has testable generated artifact metadata.
specialist_reviews.summary: The helper gives deterministic unit-testable behavior for branch and scope generation, and the permanent issue #503 plan keeps generated PRs compatible with governance-surface checks.

alternate_model_review.summary: No model-routing or architecture policy is changed; the implementation is deterministic workflow metadata generation plus documentation.

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: Issue #498 may update the Overlord Sweep artifact PR metadata helper, workflow call site, runbook docs, issue #503 plan evidence, execution scope, and validation artifact.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Implement, validate locally, open PR, wait for required checks, merge, then dispatch the sweep for Sprint #500 E2E proof.

material_deviation_rules: If workflow validation fails, do not dispatch a sweep until PR CI is green.
If issue #503 cannot remain open, stop and create a new permanent anchor issue before generated PRs are allowed to merge.
If tests require network access, replace them with deterministic local assertions.
